title: Design class boundaries for full main.py split
summary: Define class-based structure and file boundaries to fully split main.py while preserving external behavior.
outputs: Proposed file/module layout for main.py split
acceptance_criteria: Proposed classes cover all remaining main.py responsibilities with minimal overlap.
Design explicitly preserves tool call inputs/outputs matching 0.2.3.
tasks: Audit current main.py responsibilities and remaining large sections.
Define class responsibilities and interfaces for full split.
Map classes to files/modules and document migration order.
notes: Refactor only; no external behavior changes.
Keep logging and error handling consistent.
